segments.text: Yahweh spoke to Moses, saying,
Command the children of Israel, and tell them, ‘When you come into the land of Canaan (this is the land that shall fall to you for an inheritance, even the land of Canaan according to its borders),
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: then your south quarter shall be from the wilderness of Zin along by the side of Edom, and your south border shall be from the end of the Salt Sea eastward.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Your border shall turn about southward of the ascent of Akrabbim, and pass along to Zin; and it shall pass southward of Kadesh Barnea; and it shall go from there to Hazar Addar, and pass along to Azmon.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The border shall turn about from Azmon to the brook of Egypt, and it shall end at the sea.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “‘For the western border, you shall have the great sea and its border. This shall be your west border.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “‘This shall be your north border: from the great sea you shall mark out for yourselves Mount Hor.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: From Mount Hor you shall mark out to the entrance of Hamath; and the border shall pass by Zedad.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then the border shall go to Ziphron, and it shall end at Hazar Enan. This shall be your north border.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “‘You shall mark out your east border from Hazar Enan to Shepham.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The border shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, on the east side of Ain. The border shall go down, and shall reach to the side of the sea of Chinnereth eastward.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The border shall go down to the Jordan, and end at the Salt Sea. This shall be your land according to its borders around it.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Moses commanded the children of Israel, saying,
This is the land which you shall inherit by lot, which Yahweh has commanded to give to the nine tribes, and to the half-tribe;
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: for the tribe of the children of Reuben according to their fathers’ houses, the tribe of the children of Gad according to their fathers’ houses, and the half-tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The two tribes and the half-tribe have received their inheritance beyond the Jordan at Jericho eastward, toward the sunrise.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Yahweh spoke to Moses, saying,
These are the names of the men who shall divide the land to you for inheritance: Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You shall take one prince of every tribe, to divide the land for inheritance.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: These are the names of the men: Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the tribe of the children of Simeon, Shemuel the son of Ammihud.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad the son of Chislon.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the tribe of the children of Dan a prince, Bukki the son of Jogli.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the children of Joseph: of the tribe of the children of Manasseh a prince, Hanniel the son of Ephod.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the tribe of the children of Ephraim a prince, Kemuel the son of Shiphtan.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the tribe of the children of Zebulun a prince, Elizaphan the son of Parnach.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the tribe of the children of Issachar a prince, Paltiel the son of Azzan.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the tribe of the children of Asher a prince, Ahihud the son of Shelomi.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of the tribe of the children of Naphtali a prince, Pedahel the son of Ammihud.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: These are they whom Yahweh commanded to divide the inheritance to the children of Israel in the land of Canaan.
